misc: Regularly competes in the Finnish Mid Tour as well with decent results
biography: Sami, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is set to make his eighth appearance at the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. Representing Hirsala Golf, Sami is known for his calm demeanor and strategic approach to the game. Though the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his consistent presence underscores his dedication to the sport and the camaraderie of the event.

Beyond the Hector Trophée, Sami regularly tests his mettle on the Finnish Mid Tour, where he has achieved respectable results. This commitment to competitive golf ensures that Sami arrives at each Hector Trophée with a sharp game and a sportsmanlike attitude. While victories may not yet be in his column, Sami's perseverance and passion make him a respected competitor in every tournament he enters.
